title: malva trimestris var. moschata
intro: Malva trimestris var. moschata, also known as musk mallow or sweet mallow, is a variety of the Malva trimestris plant, which is a flowering plant species within the mallow family. The medicinal properties of Malva trimestris var. moschata include anti-inflammatory and soothing effects, which are attributed to its mucilaginous properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. Malva trimestris var. moschata can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
